awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of amazingly awesome PHP libraries, resources and shiny things.
awesomeList.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome PHP libraries, resources and shiny things.

nodes.itemHTML: • Docker PHP Extension Installerstars1.4k - Easily install PHP extensions in Docker containers.
